mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (
mapper.select: /* on.standard.common.file.getAtchFileList */ SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID atchFileId , FILE_SN fileSn , FILE_STRE_COURS phclFilePthNm , PHYCL_FILE_NM fileNmPhclFileNm , ORIGN_FILE_NM fileRlNm , FILE_EXTSN fileFextNm , FILE_CN fileCtt , FILE_SIZE fileSizeVal , FILE_TYPE fileTpNm , IMAGE_WIDTH imgSqrVal , IMAGE_HEIGHT imgHghtVal , ATCH_FILE fileByte , TEMPCOL_1 tempcol1 , TEMPCOL_2 tempcol2 , TEMPCOL_3 tempcol3 , TEMPCOL_4 tempcol4 , TEMPCOL_5 tempcol5 , REG_USER regId , REG_DATE regDt , DEL_YN delYn FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FILE_SN

/* on.standard.common.file.getAtchFile */ SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID atchFileId , FILE_SN fileSn , FILE_STRE_COURS phclFilePthNm , PHYCL_FILE_NM fileNmPhclFileNm , ORIGN_FILE_NM fileRlNm , FILE_EXTSN fileFextNm , FILE_CN fileCtt , FILE_SIZE fileSizeVal , FILE_TYPE fileTpNm , IMAGE_WIDTH imgSqrVal , IMAGE_HEIGHT imgHghtVal , ATCH_FILE fileByte , TEMPCOL_1 tempcol1 , TEMPCOL_2 tempcol2 , TEMPCOL_3 tempcol3 , TEMPCOL_4 tempcol4 , TEMPCOL_5 tempcol5 , REG_USER regId , REG_DATE regDt , DEL_YN delYn FROM STB_F_ATCH_FILE_DETAIL WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND FILE_SN = #{fileSn}
AND PHYCL_FILE_NM = #{fileNmPhclFileNm}
